title: Armored Wool
description: Armor to protect sheep from the wolves.
body:
## Credits
- Code for the sheep armor was based on the [Axolotl Armour Mod](https://github.com/ekulxam/axolotl-amour)
- The code for sheep variants was based on the [Backported Wolves Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/backported-wolves)
- The textures for all sheep variants was done by KattZZi

## Features
- Sheep Armor that protects sheep from most forms of damage.
- New enchantments specifically for sheep armor.
- Sheep Variants for various biomes. Custom variants can be added with datapacks.
- Sheep have different default wool colors depending on the variant.

## New Enchantments
- Trimming (1-3): When a sheep eats grass, it will drop as many wool as it would have when sheared times the enchantment level.
- Woolsplosion (1-4): When the armor breaks, it will produce an explosion, its power is dependent on the enchantment level.
- (1.2.1+) Lightness (1-2): Decreases fall speed and fall damage.

## Sheep Variants
- Barn: Vanilla sheep variant (no changes).
- Regal: Spawns in biomes with lots of flowers (Meadows, Flower Forest, etc.).
- Rocky: Spawns in stony and mountain biomes (Stoney Shores, Stoney Peaks, etc.).
- Soot: Spawns in the nether and volcanic biomes (All nether biomes, some modded volcanic biomes).
- Gloomy: Spawns in gloomy biomes (Deep Dark, Pale Garden).

## Compatibility
- Biomes O' Plenty
- Blooming Biosphere
- Wilder Wild
- Cavernous
- Profundis
- Limbo Dimension

This mod contains a config. I'd recommend checking it out if you wish to change anything about it.
